satellites.name: CHIRPS Daily
satellites.description: Climate Hazards Center InfraRed Precipitation with Station data (CHIRPS) is a 30+ year quasi-global rainfall dataset.

bands.name: precipitation

satellites.name: GPM IMERG V07 (30-Min)
satellites.description: Global Precipitation Measurement (GPM) IMERG V07 provides half-hourly global precipitation estimates combining data from all passive-microwave instruments in the GPM Constellation. The Integrated Multi-satellitE Retrievals for GPM (IMERG) algorithm intercalibrates, merges, and interpolates satellite microwave precipitation estimates together with microwave-calibrated infrared satellite estimates and precipitation gauge analyses.

bands.name: MWprecipSource

bands.name: MWprecipitation
bands.description: Merged passive microwave (PMW) precipitation estimate.

bands.name: IRinfluence
bands.description: Kalman filter weight assigned to the infrared (IR) precipitation estimate.

bands.name: IRprecipitation

bands.name: precipitation

bands.name: precipitationUncal

bands.name: probabilityLiquidPrecipitation

bands.name: randomError

satellites.name: MODIS MOD13Q1 v6.1 (16-Day)
satellites.description: The MOD13Q1 V6.1 product provides a Vegetation Index (VI) value at a per pixel basis, including NDVI and EVI, computed from atmospherically corrected bi-directional surface reflectances.

satellites.name: ERA5-Land Daily Aggregated
satellites.description: ERA5-Land is a reanalysis dataset providing a consistent view of the evolution of land variables over several decades at an enhanced resolution compared to ERA5. This dataset includes daily aggregates with 50 variables covering temperature, soil moisture, snow, lake properties, radiation, heat fluxes, evaporation, runoff, wind, and precipitation. Flow bands are aggregated as daily sums while non-flow bands are daily averages.

bands.name: dewpoint_temperature_2m
bands.description: Daily average temperature to which the air at 2 meters above the surface would have to be cooled for saturation to occur. Measure of humidity.

bands.name: temperature_2m
bands.description: Daily average temperature of air at 2m above the surface of land, sea or in-land waters.

bands.name: skin_temperature

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_1
bands.description: Daily average temperature of the soil in layer 1 (0 - 7 cm).

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_2

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_3

bands.name: lake_bottom_temperature

bands.name: lake_ice_depth

bands.name: lake_ice_temperature

bands.name: lake_mix_layer_depth

bands.name: snow_albedo

bands.name: snow_cover

bands.name: snow_density

bands.name: total_evaporation_sum

satellites.name: ERA5-Land Hourly
satellites.description: ERA5-Land is a reanalysis dataset providing a consistent view of the evolution of land variables over several decades at an enhanced resolution compared to ERA5.

bands.name: dewpoint_temperature_2m
bands.description: Temperature to which the air, at 2 meters above the surface of the Earth, would have to be cooled for saturation to occur. It is a measure of the humidity of the air.

bands.name: temperature_2m
bands.description: Temperature of air at 2m above the surface of land, sea or in-land waters.

bands.name: skin_temperature
bands.description: Temperature of the surface of the Earth. It represents the temperature of the uppermost surface layer, which has no heat capacity and so can respond instantaneously to changes in surface fluxes.

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_1
bands.description: Temperature of the soil in layer 1 (0 - 7 cm).

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_2
bands.description: Temperature of the soil in layer 2 (7-28 cm).

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_3
bands.description: Temperature of the soil in layer 3 (28-100 cm).

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_4
bands.description: Temperature of the soil in layer 4 (100-289 cm).

bands.name: lake_bottom_temperature
bands.description: Temperature of water at the bottom of inland water bodies (lakes, reservoirs, rivers) and coastal waters.

bands.name: lake_ice_depth
bands.description: The thickness of ice on inland water bodies (lakes, reservoirs and rivers) and coastal waters.

bands.name: lake_ice_temperature
bands.description: The temperature of the uppermost surface of ice on inland water bodies (lakes, reservoirs, rivers) and coastal waters.

bands.name: lake_mix_layer_depth
bands.description: The thickness of the upper most layer of an inland water body that is well mixed and has a near constant temperature with depth.

bands.name: lake_mix_layer_temperature
bands.description: The temperature of the upper most layer of inland water bodies (lakes, reservoirs and rivers) or coastal waters) that is well mixed.

bands.name: lake_shape_factor
bands.description: Describes the way that temperature changes with depth in the thermocline layer of inland water bodies.

bands.name: lake_total_layer_temperature
bands.description: The mean temperature of total water column in inland water bodies (lakes, reservoirs and rivers) and coastal waters.

bands.name: snow_albedo
bands.description: Fraction of solar (shortwave) radiation reflected by the snow, for both direct and diffuse radiation. Values vary between 0 and 1.

bands.name: snow_cover
bands.description: Represents the fraction (0-1) of the cell / grid-box occupied by snow.

bands.name: snow_density
bands.description: Mass of snow per cubic meter in the snow layer.

bands.name: snow_depth
bands.description: Instantaneous grid-box average of the snow thickness on the ground (excluding snow on canopy).

bands.name: snow_depth_water_equivalent
bands.description: Depth of snow from the snow-covered area of a grid box, in meters of water equivalent.

bands.name: snowfall
bands.description: Accumulated total snow that has fallen to the Earth's surface.

bands.name: snowmelt
bands.description: Melting of snow averaged over the grid box.

bands.name: temperature_of_snow_layer
bands.description: Gives the temperature of the snow layer from the ground to the snow-air interface.

bands.name: skin_reservoir_content
bands.description: Amount of water in the vegetation canopy and/or in a thin layer on the soil.

bands.name: volumetric_soil_water_layer_1
bands.description: Volume of water in soil layer 1 (0 - 7 cm).

bands.name: volumetric_soil_water_layer_2
bands.description: Volume of water in soil layer 2 (7 -28 cm).

bands.name: volumetric_soil_water_layer_3
bands.description: Volume of water in soil layer 3 (28 - 100 cm).

bands.name: volumetric_soil_water_layer_4
bands.description: Volume of water in soil layer 4 (100 - 289 cm).

bands.name: forecast_albedo
bands.description: Forecast surface albedo.

bands.name: surface_latent_heat_flux
bands.description: Amount of energy going from the surface to the air through evaporation, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: surface_net_solar_radiation
bands.description: Amount of solar radiation (shortwave) reaching the surface of the Earth (both direct and diffuse) minus the amount reflected by the Earth's surface, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: surface_net_thermal_radiation
bands.description: Amount of thermal radiation (longwave) emitted from the Earth's surface minus the amount of thermal radiation emitted by the atmosphere and absorbed by the surface, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: surface_sensible_heat_flux
bands.description: Transfer of heat between the Earth's surface and the atmosphere through the effects of turbulent air motion, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: surface_solar_radiation_downwards
bands.description: Amount of solar radiation (shortwave) reaching the surface of the Earth (both direct and diffuse), integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: surface_thermal_radiation_downwards
bands.description: Amount of thermal radiation (longwave) emitted by the atmosphere and absorbed by the Earth's surface, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: evaporation_from_bare_soil
bands.description: Amount of evaporation from bare soil at the top of the land surface, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: evaporation_from_open_water_surfaces_excluding_oceans
bands.description: Amount of evaporation from open water surfaces (lakes, reservoirs, rivers, wetlands), integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: evaporation_from_the_top_of_canopy
bands.description: Amount of evaporation from the canopy interception reservoir, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: evaporation_from_vegetation_transpiration
bands.description: Amount of evapotranspiration from vegetation, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: potential_evaporation
bands.description: Amount of evaporation that would occur from a vegetation canopy for the given atmospheric conditions, assuming ideal conditions, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: runoff
bands.description: Amount of water accumulated at the surface that exceeds the infiltration capacity of the soil and does not evaporate (includes both surface and sub-surface runoff), integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: snow_evaporation
bands.description: Amount of evaporation from the snow surface, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: sub_surface_runoff
bands.description: Amount of water draining through the soil and accumulating at the base of the soil column, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: surface_runoff
bands.description: Amount of water accumulated at the surface that exceeds the infiltration capacity of the soil and does not evaporate, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: total_evaporation
bands.description: Amount of evaporation and transpiration from the Earth's surface and vegetation, integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: u_component_of_wind_10m
bands.description: Eastward component of the 10m wind. It is the horizontal speed of air moving towards the east.

bands.name: v_component_of_wind_10m
bands.description: Northward component of the 10m wind. It is the horizontal speed of air moving towards the north.

bands.name: surface_pressure
bands.description: Pressure (force per unit area) of the atmosphere on the surface of land, sea and in-land water. It is a measure of the weight of all the air in a column vertically above the point of measurement.

bands.name: total_precipitation
bands.description: Total precipitation (rain and snow) integrated over the period specified.

bands.name: leaf_area_index_high_vegetation
bands.description: One half of the total green leaf area per unit horizontal ground surface area for high vegetation type.

bands.name: leaf_area_index_low_vegetation
bands.description: One half of the total green leaf area per unit horizontal ground surface area for low vegetation type.

satellites.name: ERA5 Hourly
satellites.description: ERA5 is the fifth generation ECMWF atmospheric reanalysis of the global climate produced by the Copernicus Climate Change Service (C3S). It provides hourly estimates for a large number of atmospheric, ocean-wave and land-surface quantities covering the Earth on a roughly 31 km grid with 137 levels from the surface up to 80 km altitude. This dataset represents the 'single levels' 2D parameters.

bands.name: dewpoint_temperature_2m
bands.description: Temperature to which the air at 2 metres above the surface would have to be cooled for saturation to occur. A measure of humidity.

bands.name: temperature_2m
bands.description: Temperature of air at 2m above the surface of land, sea or inland waters, calculated by interpolating between the lowest model level and the Earth's surface.

bands.name: ice_temperature_layer_1
bands.description: Sea-ice temperature in layer 1 (0 to 7cm). Part of the four-layer sea-ice slab (0-7cm, 7-28cm, 28-100cm, 100-150cm).

bands.name: ice_temperature_layer_2
bands.description: Sea-ice temperature in layer 2 (7 to 28cm). Part of the four-layer sea-ice slab (0-7cm, 7-28cm, 28-100cm, 100-150cm).

bands.name: ice_temperature_layer_3
bands.description: Sea-ice temperature in layer 3 (28 to 100cm). Part of the four-layer sea-ice slab (0-7cm, 7-28cm, 28-100cm, 100-150cm).

bands.name: ice_temperature_layer_4
bands.description: Sea-ice temperature in layer 4 (100 to 150cm). Part of the four-layer sea-ice slab (0-7cm, 7-28cm, 28-100cm, 100-150cm).

bands.name: mean_sea_level_pressure
bands.description: Pressure of the atmosphere adjusted to mean sea level height. Used to identify low and high pressure weather systems.

bands.name: sea_surface_temperature
bands.description: Foundation sea surface temperature with no diurnal variations. Before September 2007 from HadISST2; from September 2007 from OSTIA.

bands.name: skin_temperature
bands.description: Temperature of the Earth's surface (uppermost surface layer) required to satisfy the surface energy balance.

bands.name: surface_pressure
bands.description: Pressure of the atmosphere at the surface of land, sea and inland water.

bands.name: u_component_of_wind_100m
bands.description: Eastward component of wind at 100 metres above the surface of the Earth.

bands.name: v_component_of_wind_100m
bands.description: Northward component of wind at 100 metres above the surface of the Earth.

bands.name: u_component_of_neutral_wind_10m
bands.description: Eastward component of the neutral wind at 10m, calculated from surface stress assuming neutrally stratified air.

bands.name: u_component_of_wind_10m
bands.description: Eastward component of wind at 10 metres above the surface of the Earth.

bands.name: v_component_of_neutral_wind_10m
bands.description: Northward component of the neutral wind at 10m, calculated from surface stress assuming neutrally stratified air.

bands.name: v_component_of_wind_10m
bands.description: Northward component of wind at 10 metres above the surface of the Earth.

bands.name: instantaneous_10m_wind_gust
bands.description: Maximum wind gust at 10m at the specified time, averaged over 3-second intervals as defined by WMO.

bands.name: mean_boundary_layer_dissipation
bands.description: Mean rate of kinetic energy conversion into heat over the whole atmospheric column due to turbulent eddies near the surface and turbulent orographic form drag. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_convective_precipitation_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of precipitation generated by the convection scheme. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_convective_snowfall_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of snowfall generated by the convection scheme. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_eastward_gravity_wave_surface_stress
bands.description: Mean surface stress in the eastward direction associated with orographic blocking and gravity waves. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_eastward_turbulent_surface_stress
bands.description: Mean surface stress in the eastward direction associated with turbulent eddies and orographic form drag. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_evaporation_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of evaporation from the Earth's surface including simplified transpiration. Negative = evaporation, positive = condensation. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_gravity_wave_dissipation
bands.description: Mean rate of kinetic energy conversion into heat due to orographic blocking and gravity wave stress. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_large_scale_precipitation_fraction
bands.description: Mean fraction of the grid box covered by large-scale precipitation (0-1). Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_large_scale_precipitation_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of precipitation generated by the cloud scheme (large-scale). Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_large_scale_snowfall_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of snowfall generated by the cloud scheme (large-scale). Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_northward_gravity_wave_surface_stress
bands.description: Mean surface stress in the northward direction associated with orographic blocking and gravity waves. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_northward_turbulent_surface_stress
bands.description: Mean surface stress in the northward direction associated with turbulent eddies and orographic form drag. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_potential_evaporation_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of potential evaporation computed for agricultural land as if well watered. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_runoff_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of total runoff (surface + sub-surface). Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_snow_evaporation_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of snow evaporation from the snow-covered area of a grid box. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_snowfall_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of total snowfall (large-scale + convective) at the Earth's surface. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_snowmelt_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of snow melt in the snow-covered area of a grid box. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_sub_surface_runoff_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of sub-surface (underground) runoff. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_direct_short_wave_radiation_flux
bands.description: Mean rate of direct solar radiation reaching the surface. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_direct_short_wave_radiation_flux_clear_sky
bands.description: Mean rate of direct solar radiation reaching the surface assuming clear-sky (cloudless) conditions. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_downward_long_wave_radiation_flux
bands.description: Mean rate of thermal (longwave) radiation from the atmosphere reaching the surface. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_downward_long_wave_radiation_flux_clear_sky
bands.description: Mean rate of thermal radiation from the atmosphere reaching the surface assuming clear-sky conditions. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_downward_short_wave_radiation_flux
bands.description: Mean rate of solar radiation (direct + diffuse) reaching the surface. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_downward_short_wave_radiation_flux_clear_sky
bands.description: Mean rate of solar radiation reaching the surface assuming clear-sky conditions. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_downward_uv_radiation_flux
bands.description: Mean rate of UV radiation (0.20-0.44 µm) reaching the surface. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_latent_heat_flux
bands.description: Mean transfer of latent heat between the Earth's surface and atmosphere through turbulent motion. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_net_long_wave_radiation_flux
bands.description: Mean net thermal (longwave) radiation at the surface (downward minus upward). Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_net_long_wave_radiation_flux_clear_sky
bands.description: Mean net thermal radiation at the surface assuming clear-sky conditions. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_net_short_wave_radiation_flux
bands.description: Mean net solar radiation at the surface (incoming minus reflected). Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_net_short_wave_radiation_flux_clear_sky
bands.description: Mean net solar radiation at the surface assuming clear-sky conditions. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_runoff_rate
bands.description: Mean rate of surface runoff (water draining over the surface). Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_surface_sensible_heat_flux
bands.description: Mean transfer of heat between the Earth's surface and atmosphere through turbulent motion. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_top_downward_short_wave_radiation_flux
bands.description: Mean incoming solar radiation at the top of the atmosphere. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_top_net_long_wave_radiation_flux
bands.description: Mean net thermal radiation at the top of the atmosphere (negative of OLR). Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_top_net_long_wave_radiation_flux_clear_sky
bands.description: Mean thermal radiation emitted to space at the top of the atmosphere assuming clear-sky conditions. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_top_net_short_wave_radiation_flux
bands.description: Mean net solar radiation at the top of the atmosphere (incoming minus outgoing). Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_top_net_short_wave_radiation_flux_clear_sky
bands.description: Mean net solar radiation at the top of the atmosphere assuming clear-sky conditions. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_total_precipitation_rate
bands.description: Mean total precipitation rate (large-scale + convective). Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: mean_vertically_integrated_moisture_divergence
bands.description: Mean horizontal divergence of the vertically integrated moisture flux. Positive = diverging, negative = converging. Mean over the 1-hour processing period.

bands.name: clear_sky_direct_solar_radiation_at_surface
bands.description: Accumulated direct solar radiation reaching the surface assuming clear-sky conditions. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: downward_uv_radiation_at_the_surface
bands.description: Accumulated UV radiation (0.20-0.44 µm) reaching the surface. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: forecast_logarithm_of_surface_roughness_for_heat
bands.description: Natural logarithm of the roughness length for heat, representing surface resistance to heat transfer.

bands.name: instantaneous_surface_sensible_heat_flux
bands.description: Transfer of heat between the Earth's surface and atmosphere through turbulent motion at the specified time.

bands.name: near_ir_albedo_for_diffuse_radiation
bands.description: Fraction of diffuse solar radiation (0.7-4 µm) reflected by the Earth's surface (snow-free land only). Values 0-1.

bands.name: near_ir_albedo_for_direct_radiation
bands.description: Fraction of direct solar radiation (0.7-4 µm) reflected by the Earth's surface (snow-free land only). Values 0-1.

bands.name: surface_latent_heat_flux
bands.description: Accumulated transfer of latent heat between the Earth's surface and atmosphere. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: surface_net_solar_radiation
bands.description: Accumulated net solar radiation at the surface (incoming minus reflected). Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: surface_net_solar_radiation_clear_sky
bands.description: Accumulated net solar radiation at the surface assuming clear-sky conditions. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: surface_net_thermal_radiation
bands.description: Accumulated net thermal radiation at the surface (downward minus upward). Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: surface_net_thermal_radiation_clear_sky
bands.description: Accumulated net thermal radiation at the surface assuming clear-sky conditions. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: surface_sensible_heat_flux
bands.description: Accumulated transfer of heat between the Earth's surface and atmosphere through turbulent motion. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: surface_solar_radiation_downward_clear_sky
bands.description: Accumulated solar radiation reaching the surface assuming clear-sky conditions. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: surface_solar_radiation_downwards
bands.description: Accumulated solar radiation (direct + diffuse) reaching the surface. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: surface_thermal_radiation_downward_clear_sky
bands.description: Accumulated thermal radiation from the atmosphere reaching the surface assuming clear-sky conditions. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: surface_thermal_radiation_downwards
bands.description: Accumulated thermal radiation from the atmosphere and clouds reaching the surface. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: toa_incident_solar_radiation
bands.description: Accumulated incoming solar radiation received from the Sun at the top of the atmosphere. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: top_net_solar_radiation
bands.description: Accumulated net solar radiation at the top of the atmosphere (incoming minus outgoing). Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: top_net_solar_radiation_clear_sky
bands.description: Accumulated net solar radiation at the top of the atmosphere assuming clear-sky conditions. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: top_net_thermal_radiation
bands.description: Accumulated net thermal radiation at the top of the atmosphere (negative of OLR). Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: top_net_thermal_radiation_clear_sky
bands.description: Accumulated thermal radiation emitted to space at the top of the atmosphere assuming clear-sky conditions. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: total_sky_direct_solar_radiation_at_surface
bands.description: Accumulated direct solar radiation reaching the surface. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: uv_visible_albedo_for_diffuse_radiation
bands.description: Fraction of diffuse solar radiation (0.3-0.7 µm) reflected by the Earth's surface (snow-free land only). Values 0-1.

bands.name: uv_visible_albedo_for_direct_radiation
bands.description: Fraction of direct solar radiation (0.3-0.7 µm) reflected by the Earth's surface (snow-free land only). Values 0-1.

bands.name: cloud_base_height
bands.description: Height above the Earth's surface of the base of the lowest cloud layer. Fog in the lowest model layer is excluded.

bands.name: high_cloud_cover
bands.description: Fraction of grid box covered by cloud at high levels (pressure < 0.45 × surface pressure, approx. above 6km). Values 0-1.

bands.name: low_cloud_cover
bands.description: Fraction of grid box covered by cloud at low levels (pressure > 0.8 × surface pressure, approx. below 2km). Values 0-1.

bands.name: medium_cloud_cover
bands.description: Fraction of grid box covered by cloud at medium levels (0.45–0.8 × surface pressure, approx. 2-6km). Values 0-1.

bands.name: total_cloud_cover
bands.description: Fraction of grid box covered by cloud at any level. Values 0-1.

bands.name: total_column_cloud_ice_water
bands.description: Total amount of ice in clouds in a column from surface to top of atmosphere. Does not include snow (aggregated ice crystals).

bands.name: total_column_cloud_liquid_water
bands.description: Total amount of liquid water in cloud droplets in a column from surface to top of atmosphere. Does not include raindrops.

bands.name: lake_bottom_temperature
bands.description: Temperature of water at the bottom of inland water bodies (lakes, reservoirs, rivers and coastal waters).

bands.name: lake_cover
bands.description: Fraction of grid box covered by inland water bodies. Values 0-1. Does not vary in time.

bands.name: lake_depth
bands.description: Mean depth of inland water bodies from in-situ measurements and indirect estimates. Does not vary in time.

bands.name: lake_ice_depth
bands.description: Thickness of ice on inland water bodies.

bands.name: lake_ice_temperature
bands.description: Temperature of the uppermost surface of ice on inland water bodies (ice/atmosphere or ice/snow interface).

bands.name: lake_mix_layer_depth
bands.description: Thickness of the uppermost well-mixed layer of inland water bodies with near-constant temperature with depth.

bands.name: lake_mix_layer_temperature
bands.description: Temperature of the uppermost well-mixed layer of inland water bodies.

bands.name: lake_shape_factor
bands.description: Describes the shape of the vertical temperature profile in the thermocline layer of inland water bodies.

bands.name: lake_total_layer_temperature
bands.description: Mean temperature of the total water column in inland water bodies.

bands.name: evaporation
bands.description: Accumulated evaporation from the Earth's surface including simplified transpiration. Negative = evaporation, positive = condensation. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: potential_evaporation
bands.description: Accumulated potential evaporation computed for agricultural land as if well watered. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: runoff
bands.description: Accumulated total runoff (surface + sub-surface). Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: sub_surface_runoff
bands.description: Accumulated sub-surface (underground) runoff. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: surface_runoff
bands.description: Accumulated surface runoff (water draining over the surface). Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: convective_precipitation
bands.description: Accumulated precipitation generated by the convection scheme. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: convective_rain_rate
bands.description: Instantaneous rate of rainfall generated by the convection scheme at the specified time.

bands.name: instantaneous_large_scale_surface_precipitation_fraction
bands.description: Fraction of grid box (0-1) covered by large-scale precipitation at the specified time.

bands.name: large_scale_precipitation
bands.description: Accumulated precipitation generated by the cloud scheme (large-scale). Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: large_scale_precipitation_fraction
bands.description: Accumulated fraction of grid box covered by large-scale precipitation. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: large_scale_rain_rate
bands.description: Instantaneous rate of rainfall generated by the cloud scheme (large-scale) at the specified time.

bands.name: precipitation_type
bands.description: Type of precipitation: 0=None, 1=Rain, 3=Freezing rain, 5=Snow, 6=Wet snow, 7=Rain+snow mix, 8=Ice pellets.

bands.name: total_column_rain_water
bands.description: Total amount of raindrop-size water droplets in a column from the surface to the top of the atmosphere.

bands.name: total_precipitation
bands.description: Accumulated liquid and frozen water (rain + snow) falling to the Earth's surface. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: convective_snowfall
bands.description: Accumulated snowfall generated by the convection scheme. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: convective_snowfall_rate_water_equivalent
bands.description: Instantaneous rate of snowfall generated by the convection scheme at the specified time.

bands.name: large_scale_snowfall
bands.description: Accumulated snowfall generated by the cloud scheme (large-scale). Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: large_scale_snowfall_rate_water_equivalent
bands.description: Instantaneous rate of snowfall generated by the cloud scheme (large-scale) at the specified time.

bands.name: snow_albedo
bands.description: Reflectivity of the snow-covered part of the grid box for solar radiation. Ranges from 0.27-0.38 (high vegetation) to 0.52-0.88 (low vegetation, old to fresh snow).

bands.name: snow_density
bands.description: Mass of snow per cubic metre in the snow layer.

bands.name: snow_depth
bands.description: Amount of snow from the snow-covered area of a grid box in metres of water equivalent.

bands.name: snow_evaporation
bands.description: Accumulated evaporation from snow in the snow-covered area spread over the whole grid box. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: snowfall
bands.description: Accumulated total snowfall (large-scale + convective). Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: snowmelt
bands.description: Accumulated melted snow from the snow-covered area spread evenly over the whole grid box. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: temperature_of_snow_layer
bands.description: Temperature of the snow layer from the ground to the snow-air interface.

bands.name: total_column_snow_water
bands.description: Total amount of snow (aggregated ice crystals) in a column from the surface to the top of the atmosphere.

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_1
bands.description: Temperature of the soil at layer 1 (0-7cm depth).

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_2
bands.description: Temperature of the soil at layer 2 (7-28cm depth).

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_3
bands.description: Temperature of the soil at layer 3 (28-100cm depth).

bands.name: soil_temperature_level_4
bands.description: Temperature of the soil at layer 4 (100-289cm depth).

bands.name: soil_type
bands.description: Soil texture classification: 1=Coarse, 2=Medium, 3=Medium fine, 4=Fine, 5=Very fine, 6=Organic, 7=Tropical organic, 0=Non-land. Does not vary in time.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_divergence_of_cloud_frozen_water_flux
bands.description: Horizontal divergence of the vertically integrated cloud frozen water flux.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_divergence_of_cloud_liquid_water_flux
bands.description: Horizontal divergence of the vertically integrated cloud liquid water flux.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_divergence_of_geopotential_flux
bands.description: Horizontal divergence of the vertically integrated geopotential flux.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_divergence_of_kinetic_energy_flux
bands.description: Horizontal divergence of the vertically integrated kinetic energy flux.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_divergence_of_mass_flux
bands.description: Horizontal divergence of the vertically integrated mass flux.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_divergence_of_moisture_flux
bands.description: Horizontal divergence of the vertically integrated moisture flux.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_divergence_of_ozone_flux
bands.description: Horizontal divergence of the vertically integrated ozone flux.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_divergence_of_thermal_energy_flux
bands.description: Horizontal divergence of the vertically integrated thermal energy flux.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_divergence_of_total_energy_flux
bands.description: Horizontal divergence of the vertically integrated total energy flux.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_eastward_cloud_frozen_water_flux
bands.description: Eastward horizontal rate of flow of cloud frozen water for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_eastward_cloud_liquid_water_flux
bands.description: Eastward horizontal rate of flow of cloud liquid water for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_eastward_geopotential_flux
bands.description: Eastward horizontal rate of flow of geopotential for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_eastward_heat_flux
bands.description: Eastward horizontal rate of flow of heat for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_eastward_kinetic_energy_flux
bands.description: Eastward horizontal rate of flow of kinetic energy for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_eastward_mass_flux
bands.description: Eastward horizontal rate of flow of mass for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_eastward_ozone_flux
bands.description: Eastward horizontal rate of flow of ozone for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_eastward_total_energy_flux
bands.description: Eastward horizontal rate of flow of total energy for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_eastward_water_vapour_flux
bands.description: Eastward horizontal rate of flow of water vapour for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_energy_conversion
bands.description: Conversion between kinetic energy and internal+potential energy for a column. Negative = conversion to kinetic energy.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_kinetic_energy
bands.description: Vertical integral of kinetic energy (horizontal motion only) for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_mass_of_atmosphere
bands.description: Total mass of air for a column from surface to top of atmosphere (surface pressure divided by g).

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_mass_tendency
bands.description: Rate of change of mass of a column of air from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_northward_cloud_frozen_water_flux
bands.description: Northward horizontal rate of flow of cloud frozen water for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_northward_cloud_liquid_water_flux
bands.description: Northward horizontal rate of flow of cloud liquid water for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_northward_geopotential_flux
bands.description: Northward horizontal rate of flow of geopotential for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_northward_heat_flux
bands.description: Northward horizontal rate of flow of heat for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_northward_kinetic_energy_flux
bands.description: Northward horizontal rate of flow of kinetic energy for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_northward_mass_flux
bands.description: Northward horizontal rate of flow of mass for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_northward_ozone_flux
bands.description: Northward horizontal rate of flow of ozone for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: high_vegetation_cover
bands.description: Fraction of grid box covered by high vegetation (evergreen/deciduous trees, mixed forest, interrupted forest). Does not vary in time.

bands.name: leaf_area_index_high_vegetation
bands.description: One-sided green leaf area per unit ground area for high vegetation type.

bands.name: leaf_area_index_low_vegetation
bands.description: One-sided green leaf area per unit ground area for low vegetation type.

bands.name: low_vegetation_cover
bands.description: Fraction of grid box covered by low vegetation (crops, grass, shrubs, tundra, etc.). Does not vary in time.

bands.name: type_of_high_vegetation
bands.description: High vegetation type: 3=Evergreen needleleaf, 4=Deciduous needleleaf, 5=Deciduous broadleaf, 6=Evergreen broadleaf, 18=Mixed forest, 19=Interrupted forest. Does not vary in time.

bands.name: type_of_low_vegetation
bands.description: Low vegetation type: 1=Crops/mixed farming, 2=Grass, 7=Tall grass, 9=Tundra, 10=Irrigated crops, 11=Semidesert, 13=Bogs/marshes, 16=Evergreen shrubs, 17=Deciduous shrubs, 20=Water/land mixtures. Does not vary in time.

bands.name: air_density_over_the_oceans
bands.description: Mass of air per cubic metre over the oceans, derived from temperature, specific humidity and pressure at the lowest model level. Only defined over ocean wave model grid.

bands.name: coefficient_of_drag_with_waves
bands.description: Resistance that ocean waves exert on the atmosphere (friction coefficient), calculated as the ratio of friction velocity squared to neutral wind speed squared.

bands.name: free_convective_velocity_over_the_oceans
bands.description: Estimated vertical velocity of updraughts generated by free convection, used to estimate wind gust impact on ocean wave growth. Only defined over ocean wave model grid.

bands.name: maximum_individual_wave_height
bands.description: Estimated height of the expected highest individual wave within a 20-minute time window. Waves > 2× significant wave height are considered freak waves.

bands.name: mean_direction_of_total_swell
bands.description: Mean direction waves associated with swell are coming from, in degrees true (0=from north, 90=from east).

bands.name: mean_direction_of_wind_waves
bands.description: Mean direction of wind-generated waves, in degrees true (0=from north, 90=from east).

bands.name: mean_period_of_total_swell
bands.description: Average time between consecutive wave crests associated with swell.

bands.name: mean_period_of_wind_waves
bands.description: Average time between consecutive wave crests generated by local winds.

bands.name: mean_square_slope_of_waves
bands.description: Average slope of combined wind-sea and swell waves. Higher values indicate steeper, rougher sea surface.

bands.name: mean_wave_direction
bands.description: Mean direction of all ocean/sea surface waves (wind-sea + swell), in degrees true.

bands.name: mean_wave_direction_of_first_swell_partition
bands.description: Mean direction of waves in the first (largest) swell partition, in degrees true.

bands.name: mean_wave_direction_of_second_swell_partition
bands.description: Mean direction of waves in the second swell partition, in degrees true.

bands.name: mean_wave_direction_of_third_swell_partition
bands.description: Mean direction of waves in the third swell partition, in degrees true.

bands.name: mean_wave_period
bands.description: Average time between consecutive wave crests for all ocean/sea surface waves (wind-sea + swell).

bands.name: mean_wave_period_based_on_first_moment
bands.description: Reciprocal of the mean frequency of all wave components, weighted by amplitude. Used to estimate Stokes drift transport.

bands.name: mean_wave_period_based_on_first_moment_for_swell
bands.description: Reciprocal of the mean frequency of swell wave components, weighted by amplitude.

bands.name: mean_wave_period_based_on_first_moment_for_wind_waves
bands.description: Reciprocal of the mean frequency of wind-wave components, weighted by amplitude.

bands.name: mean_wave_period_based_on_second_moment_for_swell
bands.description: Zero-crossing mean wave period for swell, equivalent to the mean time between sea surface zero-crossings.

bands.name: mean_wave_period_based_on_second_moment_for_wind_waves
bands.description: Zero-crossing mean wave period for wind-generated waves.

bands.name: mean_wave_period_of_first_swell_partition
bands.description: Mean wave period of the first (largest) swell partition.

bands.name: mean_wave_period_of_second_swell_partition
bands.description: Mean wave period of the second swell partition.

bands.name: mean_wave_period_of_third_swell_partition
bands.description: Mean wave period of the third swell partition.

bands.name: mean_zero_crossing_wave_period
bands.description: Mean time between occasions where the sea/ocean surface crosses mean sea level.

bands.name: model_bathymetry
bands.description: Depth of water from the surface to the ocean bottom as used by the ocean wave model.

bands.name: normalized_energy_flux_into_ocean
bands.description: Normalised vertical flux of turbulent kinetic energy from breaking ocean waves into the ocean. Negative values indicate flux into ocean.

bands.name: normalized_energy_flux_into_waves
bands.description: Normalised vertical flux of energy from wind into ocean waves. Positive = flux into waves.

bands.name: normalized_stress_into_ocean
bands.description: Normalised surface stress from air into ocean due to turbulence and breaking waves (excluding wave generation).

bands.name: ocean_surface_stress_equivalent_10m_neutral_wind_direction
bands.description: Direction from which the neutral wind blows at 10m, in degrees clockwise from true north. Only defined over ocean wave model grid.

bands.name: ocean_surface_stress_equivalent_10m_neutral_wind_speed
bands.description: Horizontal speed of the neutral wind at 10m used to force the ocean wave model. Only defined over ocean wave model grid.

bands.name: peak_wave_period
bands.description: Period of the most energetic ocean waves (wind-sea + swell), corresponding to the peak of the frequency spectrum.

bands.name: period_corresponding_to_maximum_individual_wave_height
bands.description: Period of the expected highest individual wave within a 20-minute time window.

bands.name: significant_height_of_combined_wind_waves_and_swell
bands.description: Average height of the highest third of surface ocean/sea waves (wind-sea + swell). Equivalent to 4× the square root of the integrated wave spectrum.

bands.name: significant_height_of_total_swell
bands.description: Average height of the highest third of swell waves only.

bands.name: significant_height_of_wind_waves
bands.description: Average height of the highest third of wind-generated waves only.

bands.name: significant_wave_height_of_first_swell_partition
bands.description: Average height of the highest third of waves in the first (largest) swell partition.

bands.name: significant_wave_height_of_second_swell_partition
bands.description: Average height of the highest third of waves in the second swell partition.

bands.name: significant_wave_height_of_third_swell_partition
bands.description: Average height of the highest third of waves in the third swell partition.

bands.name: angle_of_sub_gridscale_orography
bands.description: Geographical orientation of sub-grid terrain relative to an eastward axis. Used in the sub-grid orography scheme. Does not vary in time.

bands.name: anisotropy_of_sub_gridscale_orography
bands.description: Distortion of sub-grid terrain shape from a circle: 1=circle, <1=ellipse, 0=ridge. Does not vary in time.

bands.name: benjamin_feir_index
bands.description: Index for freak wave probability. Values around 1 indicate increased probability of freak waves.

bands.name: boundary_layer_dissipation
bands.description: Accumulated conversion of kinetic energy into heat due to turbulent eddies and orographic form drag. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: boundary_layer_height
bands.description: Depth of air next to the Earth's surface most affected by surface resistance to momentum, heat or moisture transfer.

bands.name: charnock
bands.description: Accounts for increased aerodynamic roughness as wave heights grow with surface stress. Constant 0.018 without wave coupling.

bands.name: convective_available_potential_energy
bands.description: Instability of the atmosphere indicating potential for convection and severe weather. Values >1000 J/kg indicate significant thunderstorm potential.

bands.name: convective_inhibition
bands.description: Energy required for convection to commence. Values >200 J/kg indicate convection unlikely even with high CAPE.

bands.name: duct_base_height
bands.description: Duct base height as diagnosed from the vertical gradient of atmospheric refractivity.

bands.name: eastward_gravity_wave_surface_stress
bands.description: Accumulated surface stress in the eastward direction from orographic blocking and gravity waves. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: eastward_turbulent_surface_stress
bands.description: Accumulated surface stress in the eastward direction from turbulent eddies and orographic form drag. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: forecast_albedo
bands.description: Fraction of solar radiation reflected by the Earth's surface. Snow/ice ~0.8+, land 0.1-0.4, ocean ~0.1. Values 0-1.

bands.name: forecast_surface_roughness
bands.description: Aerodynamic roughness length in metres. Higher values cause slower near-surface wind speed.

bands.name: friction_velocity
bands.description: Theoretical wind speed at the Earth's surface expressing the magnitude of surface stress. Increases with surface roughness.

bands.name: gravity_wave_dissipation
bands.description: Accumulated conversion of kinetic energy into heat due to orographic blocking and gravity waves. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: instantaneous_eastward_turbulent_surface_stress
bands.description: Instantaneous surface stress in the eastward direction from turbulent eddies and orographic form drag at the specified time.

bands.name: instantaneous_moisture_flux
bands.description: Net rate of moisture exchange between the surface and atmosphere at the specified time. Negative = evaporation, positive = condensation.

bands.name: instantaneous_northward_turbulent_surface_stress
bands.description: Instantaneous surface stress in the northward direction from turbulent eddies and orographic form drag at the specified time.

bands.name: k_index
bands.description: Thunderstorm potential index: <20=None, 20-25=Isolated, 26-30=Widely scattered, 31-35=Scattered, >35=Numerous thunderstorms.

bands.name: land_sea_mask
bands.description: Proportion of land vs ocean/water in a grid box. Values >0.5 include land; ≤0.5 are water surfaces. Does not vary in time.

bands.name: mean_vertical_gradient_of_refractivity_inside_trapping_layer
bands.description: Mean vertical gradient of atmospheric refractivity inside the trapping layer.

bands.name: minimum_vertical_gradient_of_refractivity_inside_trapping_layer
bands.description: Minimum vertical gradient of atmospheric refractivity inside the trapping layer.

bands.name: northward_gravity_wave_surface_stress
bands.description: Accumulated surface stress in the northward direction from orographic blocking and gravity waves. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: northward_turbulent_surface_stress
bands.description: Accumulated surface stress in the northward direction from turbulent eddies and orographic form drag. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: sea_ice_cover
bands.description: Fraction of grid box covered by sea ice. Before 1979: HadISST2; 1979-Aug 2007: OSI SAF (409a); from Sep 2007: OSI SAF oper.

bands.name: skin_reservoir_content
bands.description: Amount of water in the vegetation canopy and/or thin soil surface layer (intercepted rain, dew). Water leaves by evaporation.

bands.name: slope_of_sub_gridscale_orography
bands.description: Slope of sub-grid valleys, hills and mountains. 0=flat surface, 0.5=45° slope. Does not vary in time.

bands.name: standard_deviation_of_filtered_subgrid_orography
bands.description: Standard deviation of filtered sub-grid orography (scales ~3-22 km). Does not vary in time.

bands.name: standard_deviation_of_orography
bands.description: Standard deviation of the height of sub-grid valleys, hills and mountains within a grid box. Does not vary in time.

bands.name: total_column_ozone
bands.description: Total amount of ozone in a column from surface to top of atmosphere (dominated by stratospheric ozone). 1 DU = 2.1415E-5 kg/m^2.

bands.name: total_column_supercooled_liquid_water
bands.description: Total amount of supercooled water (liquid below 0°C) in a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: total_column_water
bands.description: Sum of water vapour, liquid water, cloud ice, rain and snow in a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: total_column_water_vapour
bands.description: Total amount of water vapour in a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: total_totals_index
bands.description: Thunderstorm severity index: <44=Unlikely, 44-50=Likely, 51-52=Isolated severe, 53-56=Widely scattered severe, 56-60=Scattered severe.

bands.name: trapping_layer_base_height
bands.description: Trapping layer base height as diagnosed from the vertical gradient of atmospheric refractivity.

bands.name: trapping_layer_top_height
bands.description: Trapping layer top height as diagnosed from the vertical gradient of atmospheric refractivity.

bands.name: u_component_stokes_drift
bands.description: Eastward component of surface Stokes drift — net drift velocity due to surface wind waves.

bands.name: v_component_stokes_drift
bands.description: Northward component of surface Stokes drift — net drift velocity due to surface wind waves.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_northward_total_energy_flux
bands.description: Northward horizontal rate of flow of total energy for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_northward_water_vapour_flux
bands.description: Northward horizontal rate of flow of water vapour for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_potential_and_internal_energy
bands.description: Mass-weighted vertical integral of potential and internal energy for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_potential_internal_and_latent_energy
bands.description: Mass-weighted vertical integral of potential, internal and latent energy for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_temperature
bands.description: Mass-weighted vertical integral of temperature for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_thermal_energy
bands.description: Mass-weighted vertical integral of thermal energy (enthalpy) for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertical_integral_of_total_energy
bands.description: Vertical integral of total energy (internal + potential + kinetic + latent) for a column from surface to top of atmosphere.

bands.name: vertically_integrated_moisture_divergence
bands.description: Accumulated horizontal divergence of vertically integrated moisture flux. Positive = diverging, negative = converging. Accumulated over the 1-hour period ending at validity time.

bands.name: volumetric_soil_water_layer_1
bands.description: Volume of water in soil layer 1 (0-7cm depth).

bands.name: volumetric_soil_water_layer_2
bands.description: Volume of water in soil layer 2 (7-28cm depth).

bands.name: volumetric_soil_water_layer_3
bands.description: Volume of water in soil layer 3 (28-100cm depth).

bands.name: volumetric_soil_water_layer_4
bands.description: Volume of water in soil layer 4 (100-289cm depth).

bands.name: wave_spectral_directional_width
bands.description: Range of wave directions across the full wave spectrum. 0=uni-directional, √2=uniform distribution.

bands.name: wave_spectral_directional_width_for_swell
bands.description: Range of wave directions for swell only. 0=uni-directional, √2=uniform distribution.

bands.name: wave_spectral_directional_width_for_wind_waves
bands.description: Range of wave directions for wind-generated waves only. 0=uni-directional, √2=uniform distribution.

bands.name: wave_spectral_kurtosis
bands.description: Statistical measure for freak wave forecasting. Positive kurtosis (typical range 0.0-0.06) indicates more frequent extreme sea surface values.

bands.name: wave_spectral_peakedness
bands.description: Goda's peakedness factor — measure of the relative width of the wave frequency spectrum. Used to compute the Benjamin-Feir Index.

bands.name: wave_spectral_skewness
bands.description: Statistical measure for freak wave forecasting. Typical range -0.2 to 0.12. Positive = more extreme values above the mean.

bands.name: zero_degree_level
bands.description: Height above the Earth's surface where temperature passes from positive to negative. Set to zero when the entire atmosphere is below 0°C.

bands.name: wind_gust_since_previous_post_processing_10m
bands.description: Maximum 3-second wind gust at 10m as defined by WMO, kept since the last postprocessing step. Includes convection effects from 01/10/2008 onwards.

bands.name: geopotential
bands.description: Gravitational potential energy of a unit mass at the surface relative to mean sea level (surface orography). Does not vary in time.

bands.name: maximum_2m_temperature_since_previous_post_processing
bands.description: Highest temperature of air at 2m since the last postprocessing step.

bands.name: maximum_total_precipitation_rate_since_previous_post_processing
bands.description: Maximum total precipitation rate (large-scale + convective) since the last postprocessing step.

bands.name: minimum_2m_temperature_since_previous_post_processing
bands.description: Lowest temperature of air at 2m since the last postprocessing step.

bands.name: minimum_total_precipitation_rate_since_previous_post_processing
bands.description: Minimum total precipitation rate (large-scale + convective) since the last postprocessing step.

bands.name: divergence_500hPa
bands.description: Divergence of the wind at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: divergence_850hPa
bands.description: Divergence of the wind at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: fraction_of_cloud_cover_500hPa
bands.description: Fraction of cloud cover at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: fraction_of_cloud_cover_850hPa
bands.description: Fraction of cloud cover at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: ozone_mass_mixing_ratio_500hPa
bands.description: Mass mixing ratio of ozone at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: ozone_mass_mixing_ratio_850hPa
bands.description: Mass mixing ratio of ozone at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: potential_vorticity_500hPa
bands.description: Potential vorticity at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: potential_vorticity_850hPa
bands.description: Potential vorticity at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: relative_humidity_500hPa
bands.description: Relative humidity at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: relative_humidity_850hPa
bands.description: Relative humidity at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: specific_cloud_ice_water_content_500hPa
bands.description: Specific cloud ice water content at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: specific_cloud_ice_water_content_850hPa
bands.description: Specific cloud ice water content at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: specific_cloud_liquid_water_content_500hPa
bands.description: Specific cloud liquid water content at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: specific_cloud_liquid_water_content_850hPa
bands.description: Specific cloud liquid water content at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: specific_humidity_500hPa
bands.description: Specific humidity at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: specific_humidity_850hPa
bands.description: Specific humidity at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: specific_rain_water_content_500hPa
bands.description: Specific rain water content at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: specific_rain_water_content_850hPa
bands.description: Specific rain water content at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: specific_snow_water_content_500hPa
bands.description: Specific snow water content at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: specific_snow_water_content_850hPa
bands.description: Specific snow water content at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: temperature_500hPa
bands.description: Temperature at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: temperature_850hPa
bands.description: Temperature at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: u_component_of_wind_500hPa
bands.description: Eastward component of wind at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: u_component_of_wind_850hPa
bands.description: Eastward component of wind at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: v_component_of_wind_500hPa
bands.description: Northward component of wind at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: v_component_of_wind_850hPa
bands.description: Northward component of wind at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: vertical_velocity_500hPa
bands.description: Vertical velocity at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: vertical_velocity_850hPa
bands.description: Vertical velocity at the 850 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: vorticity_500hPa
bands.description: Vorticity of the wind at the 500 hPa pressure level.

bands.name: vorticity_850hPa
bands.description: Vorticity of the wind at the 850 hPa pressure level.

masks.name: ESA WorldCereal 10m v100
masks.description: A global-scale annual and seasonal crop map product suite. The collection contains up to 106 agro-ecological zone (AEZ) images for each product which were all processed with respect to their own regional seasonality.

bands.name: classification
bands.description: Binary classification (0 or 100)

bands.name: confidence
bands.description: Classification confidence
